summary: Iter 114 review — Employee Full Report + Sub Admin Performance chart + QR-scoped landing. Backend: 7/7 pytest passes (JSON aggregate, XLSX PK magic, PDF %PDF magic, 400 on missing dates, 404 on unknown user, 401 without auth, users-log Jun-Jul 2026 returns events). Frontend: (1) /employee-report loads at correct URL (not /admin), Kankani firm picker, employee search 'SURENDRA' returns 3 matches, This FY chip pre-fills 2026-04-01→2026-07-13, Generate Full Report renders Profile / Attendance / Leaves / Actual Salary / Compliance Salary / Documents / Tickets sections, Export Excel & Export PDF buttons visible. (2) /users-log-report renders 'Sub Admin Performance' card with Punch/Salary/Compliance/Other legend, Last 7/30/90 days quick chips work, per-admin stacked horizontal bars render (super_admin: 24 actions = Salary 15 + Compliance 9; blank admin row: 68 Punch actions), 92 total log entries in Last 90 days. (3) Mobile viewport 390x844: /get-app?type=employee sets localStorage qr_entry_type=employee then / shows ONLY 'Employee sign in' (Admin & Company hidden) + 'Show all sign-in options' link which restores all three; /get-app?type=employer hides only 'Employee sign in' — Admin & Company remain. All acceptance criteria met.

issues: Console noise: 'shadow*' style props deprecated (use boxShadow); 'outline' and 'background' shorthand style property warnings — pre-existing across the app, not caused by this iteration

critical_code_review_comments: employee_full_report.py cleanly strips pin_hash / password_hash / face_descriptor / face_base64 / selfie_base64 / base64 / file_base64 / attachments before returning — good PII hygiene
_gather scopes via _load_scoped_employee_any_role so sub_admin/company_admin can only pull employees they own — correct RBAC via 404 on cross-scope
XLSX & PDF exports reuse _gather so exports match the JSON exactly — no duplication

XLSX/PDF export, Sub Admin Performance stacked-bar card on /users-log-report, QR-scoped landing via /get-app?type=employee|employer + localStorage qr_entry_type) fully validated.
